nasb.text: In those times there was no peace to him who went out or to him who came in, for many disturbances afflicted all the inhabitants of the lands.

esv.text: In those times there was no peace to him who went out or to him who came in, for great disturbances afflicted all the inhabitants of the lands.

cnv.text: 那時，出入的人都沒有平安，因為各國的居民都遭遇動亂。

ccb.text: 那时，人们出入不得平安，因为各地都有动乱。
